translated: When we came, our elders would gather all of us and teach us. Our mothers would also teach us and tell us that we should not go to the house of the Jews.

translated: And Jesus said to him, “Where are you going? Can't you see I am going to my father's house? Where are you going now?” And he said to him, “I am also going there.”

text: Ambɛrɛ Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ kere­fɔm, ni Farasi­fɔm n bo am ti burukɔɔ­nu­fɔm ni, am bá ŋu anyum­boro. translated: The Anufo people have a proverb that says, when the Farasi people and the Burukunufu people are together, they can accomplish anything.
